content: CSS marquee seamless loop: duplicate HTML content inside .marquee-track. Animate transform: translateX(0) to translateX(-50%) — the -50% accounts for the duplicated content. Use width: max-content on track. animation-timing-function: linear. animation-iteration-count: infinite. Add aria-hidden='true' on duplicate set. Respect prefers-reduced-motion: { animation: none }. Gap between items handled via gap property on flex container.
